_comment: Add a _ before an option name to comment it out and it wont be added to the apworld
Using 'goal' as the name of an option let you override some of the generated goal parameters
goal.description:
Victory Crowns: McGuffin Goalset. Getting a specific number of Victory Crown items to Goal.
Eliminations: Reaching a Total number of personal Eliminations to Goal.
Accolades: Completing a Specified % of Accolades to Goal.

death_link.description:
When the Squad get's wiped from the match
Suggested Recieve: If Playing Solo Leave the Match.
Please by wise and don't compromise another player's experience in a MultiSquad Playlist.

filler_traps._comment: Using values here let you set a 'recommended' filler_trap percentage or even a default percentage
